x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Product linkage on CSM cases enables Now Assist to provide product-specific AI troubleshooting suggestions.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Link CSM cases to product catalog items at case creation. Import product data from authoritative sources. Target: 70%+ of closed cases linked to a product. Now Assist CSM uses product context for targeted AI troubleshooting suggestions.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_8603a33acfd903108935fb251d851c91
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE">
<ai_justification><![CDATA[Product linkage on CSM cases enables Now Assist to provide product-specific AI troubleshooting suggestions.]]></ai_justification>
<check_name>CSM Product Catalog Linkage</check_name>
<check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var cutoff = new GlideDateTime();
    cutoff.addYearsUTC(-1);

    var gaTotal = new GlideAggregate('sn_customerservice_case');
    gaTotal.addQuery('state', 'IN', '3,6');
    gaTotal.addQuery('closed_at', '>=', cutoff.getValue());
    gaTotal.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaTotal.query();
    var total = gaTotal.next() ? parseInt(gaTotal.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    if (total === 0) {
        return {
            status: 'not_applicable',
            actualValue: 'No closed CSM cases in last 12 months',
            finding: 'No closed CSM cases found in the last 12 months. Product linkage cannot be assessed.'
        };
    }

    var gaWithProd = new GlideAggregate('sn_customerservice_case');
    gaWithProd.addQuery('state', 'IN', '3,6');
    gaWithProd.addQuery('closed_at', '>=', cutoff.getValue());
    gaWithProd.addQuery('product', '!=', '');
    gaWithProd.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaWithProd.query();
    var withProd = gaWithProd.next() ? parseInt(gaWithProd.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var pct = Math.round((withProd / total) * 100);
    var actualValue = pct + '% of closed CSM cases have product linked (last 12 months, ' + withProd + '/' + total + ')';

    if (pct >= 70) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: pct + '% of closed CSM cases have a product linked. Now Assist CSM can provide product-specific AI troubleshooting guidance.'
        };
    } else if (pct >= 40) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + pct + '% of closed CSM cases have a product linked (target: 70%). Now Assist CSM product-specific AI guidance will be limited for cases without product context.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + pct + '% of CSM cases have a product linked. Now Assist CSM cannot provide targeted AI troubleshooting without product context.'
        };
    }
})]]></check_script>
<is_active>true</is_active>
<is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive>
<is_manual>false</is_manual>
<module>CSM</module>
<number>CHK0006051</number>
<order>140</order>
<remediation_guidance>Link CSM cases to product catalog items at case creation. Import product data from authoritative sources. Target: 70%+ of closed cases linked to a product. Now Assist CSM uses product context for targeted AI troubleshooting suggestions.</remediation_guidance>
<sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by>
<sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_created_on>
<sys_id>8603a33acfd903108935fb251d851c91</sys_id>
<sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count>
<sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by>
<sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_updated_on>
</x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
